articles.title: OPENAI RELEASES GPT-4
articles.summary: It’s finally here! GPT-4 is a smarter, safer, and more robust version of its predecessor. GPT-4 is safer and more aligned, but still has limitations. It is 82% less likely to respond to requests for disallowed content and 40% more likely to produce factual responses than GPT-3.5 based on internal evaluations. Companies like Duolingo, Khan Academy, and Stripe are already using the service. Also, a correction from yesterday’s newsletter: previous rumors that GPT-4 will include text-to-video capabilities are actually not true. GPT-4 has not yet made the leap to multimodal outputs like video, but it can take in both video and text as inputs!

articles.title: GOOGLE UNVEILS NEW PALM API AND MAKERSUITE TOOL
MINUTE READ) [https://arxiv.org/abs/2303.07295?utm_source=tldrai]
articles.summary: This paper proposes a new pre-training paradigm that improves the training data efficiency and capabilities of language models in the infilling task. The paradigm includes a bidirectional training objective that aligns the predictions of left-to-right and right-to-left LMs and a bidirectional inference procedure. The approach is evaluated on programming and natural language models and outperforms strong baselines.

articles.title: MINUTE READ) [https://arxiv.org/abs/2303.07320?utm_source=tldrai]
articles.summary: The MVP method demonstrates surprising gains in adversarial robustness, improving performance against adversarial word-level synonym substitutions by an average of 8% over standard methods, and even outperforming state-of-art defenses by 3.5%. By modifying the input with a prompt template instead of modifying the model by appending an MLP head, MVP achieves better results in downstream tasks while maintaining clean accuracy.

articles.title: DISTRIBUTION FITTING
articles.summary: UniDiffuser is a framework for fitting all distributions relevant to multi-modal data in one model. It achieves this by unifying diffusion models for marginal, conditional, and joint distributions. UniDiffuser is able to perform image, text, text-to-image, image-to-text, and image-text pair generation with high-quality results and competitive quantitative scores.

articles.title: UNIDIFFUSER
articles.summary: UniDiffuser is a unified diffusion framework to fit all distributions relevant to a set of multi-modal data in one model.

articles.title: WRITEOUT.AI [https://github.com/beyondcode/writeout.ai]
articles.summary: Writeout.ai translates audio files using OpenAI’s Whisper API.

articles.title: MICROSOFT HAS LAID OFF ONE OF ITS RESPONSIBLE AI TEAMS
GOOGLE ANNOUNCES NEW AI FEATURES FOR WORKSPACE
THE AGE OF INFINITE MISINFORMATION HAS ARRIVED
articles.summary: In this article, Gary Marcus makes the case that bad actors could seize on large language models to engineer falsehoods at unprecedented scale.
